title: Four Findings in Algernon 1.17.6 with AI fuzzing
summary: Using Qwen 3.6 35B with a custom harness to find bugs on Algernon web server and finding four pre-auth issues.

title: Patching Alicesoft Games So They Run Outside Japan Time
summary: Some Alicesoft games crash unless your Windows clock is set to JST. This post explains how to patch the affected games so they run correctly in any timezone.

title: How to Report a Vulnerable Driver and Get a CVE
summary: A plain-English walkthrough for beginners - who to report to, how coordinated disclosure works, and how to request a CVE number from MITRE.

title: Hello World
summary: First post - who I am, why this blog exists, and what to expect.
